backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the HR Management Portal backend, defining data types (employee, leave, payroll, letters) and state maps, with role-based access control via mixins for HR/admin authorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two bug-fix features—fixing AddEmployeeForm submission and fixing React Query hooks for employee fetching—to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes of each component, page, hook, and utility in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the application.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript module for the HR Management Portal.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component configuring TanStack Router with all application routes, handling authentication state, profile setup modal display, and wrapping the app in the layout with a Toaster.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginPage.t: Login page component displaying HR portal branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity login button with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time users to set up their profile by entering a name and selecting a role, submitting via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/common/EmptyStat: Reusable empty state UI component that displays an icon, title, description, and an optional action button.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: Reusable loading spinner component with configurable size and optional text label.
frontend/src/components/employees/AddEmp: Form component for adding a new employee, collecting personal, employment, address, and emergency contact details, then submitting via the useAddEmployee mutation.
Modal dialog wrapper around AddEmployeeForm for creating a new employee record.
frontend/src/components/employees/Import: Modal for bulk-importing employees via CSV upload, with parsing, validation preview, and bulk creation via the useBulkCreateEmployees mutation.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Root layout component that composes the Header, Sidebar, and main content area with responsive sidebar toggle state.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Fixed top header with app branding, user avatar dropdown showing profile info, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/Sidebar.t: Responsive sidebar navigation with links to all main app sections, supporting mobile overlay and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, employees, leave requests, payslips, and letters, with appropriate cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for a warm earth-tone design system with light/dark mode variables and status utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin panel page that checks caller admin status and displays system stats (users, sessions, health) with an access-denied fallback for non-admins.
frontend/src/pages/Attendance.tsx: Attendance tracking page showing static stats (present days, absences, late arrivals, hours) with clock-in/out buttons and a placeholder calendar view.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero banner, employee/leave/attendance stats grid fetched from the backend, and quick-link cards for recent activities and upcoming events.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeDirectory.tsx: Displays a searchable, filterable list of all employees with cards showing avatar, email, department, and status. HR staff and admins can add, import, or export employees via modals and CSV utilities.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeProfile.tsx: Shows a detailed profile page for a single employee fetched by ID, displaying contact info, department, role badge, and status. Handles loading and error/not-found states with navigation back to the directory.
frontend/src/pages/HelpDesk.tsx: Placeholder Help Desk page with a search bar, filter button, and a 'Create Ticket' button, currently showing an empty state with no ticket data.
frontend/src/pages/LeaveManagement.tsx: Displays the current user's leave balances (annual, sick, casual, unpaid) in summary cards and a leave history section, with a 'Request Leave' button. Data is static/placeholder pending backend integration.
frontend/src/pages/Payroll.tsx: Placeholder Payroll page showing current month salary breakdown (all dashes) and quick-action buttons to download payslips or view salary structure, with an empty payslip history section.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Provides utilities to generate a CSV Blob from an array of EmployeeRecord objects, trigger a browser file download, and produce a timestamped export filename.
frontend/src/utils/csvParser.ts: Provides CSV parsing (including quoted-field handling) and per-row validation logic for bulk employee imports, converting raw CSV rows into typed, validated employee data objects with error reporting.
frontend/src/utils/csvTemplate.ts: Generates and downloads a CSV template for employee bulk import, including headers for all employee fields and two sample data rows.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography, container queries, animation plugins, and custom font families.
project_state.json: Tracks the HR Management Portal project state at version 3, documenting existing feature fixes for AddEmployeeForm and React Query hooks, plus a pending backend investigation for the addEmployee actor function.
